hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or ''
if not f.endswith('.py'): sys.exit(0)
os.system(f'ruff format {f!r} && ruff check --fix --quiet {f!r}')
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_input', {}).get('path') or ''
if not f.endswith('.py'): sys.exit(0)
root = os.popen(f'git -C {os.path.dirname(f)!r} rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null').read().strip() or '/home/kaushal/Plugins'
os.system(f'cd {root!r} && pre-commit run --files {f!r} --color=always 2>&1 || echo \"✓ Pre-commit check complete\"')
"
